judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent used a correct overall plan but implemented faulty heuristics in execute_python (e.g., checking is_2016 by `'2016' in text_start` and domain by only 'physical activity'/'exercise' in text) on data from query_db:6 and query_db:16, which caused it to miss most 2016 physical activity papers and return only "ArmSleeve" with an incorrect summed citation total (452) instead of the ground-truth set and counts.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent filtered papers by searching for the string "2016" anywhere in the full text (query_db:14) and inferred the 'physical activity' domain via ad-hoc keyword counts (execute_python:18), then summed citations for those titles (query_db:20), a plan that does not extract true publication year or domain metadata—leading to incorrect inclusions (e.g., a 2018 paper) and omissions.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In execute_python:20 (fed by query_db:2 and query_db:14), the agent used overly broad keyword matching on full-text (e.g., "fitness", "activity tracking") to infer the 'physical activity' domain and relied on a 100-document limited Mongo result, leading to misclassification and omission of relevant 2016 papers before joining to summed citations, so the returned titles and totals don't match the ground truth.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent used a flawed plan by selecting a single CHI 2016 paper ("Beyond Abandonment to Next Steps...") just because its full text mentioned "physical activity" (query_db:62) and then pulled its total citations from an overall aggregation (query_db:52), instead of identifying all 2016 papers in the physical activity domain and summing their citations.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent filtered Citations by citation_year=2016 (execute_python:26 on query_db:22) and then pulled total sums by keyword (query_db:36), conflating citation year with publication year and never extracting 2016 publication year or 'physical activity' domain from paper_docs, leading to an incorrect set of titles and totals.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
